chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-1981 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTION. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 10581/2025. 2) For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 23.05.2025. Mr. Rashid Mehar, Advocate for Petitioner. ________________ 1) Granted. 2) Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that there are certain subsequent developments and under instructions he intends to withdraw the Petition with permission to file a fresh Petition. Since notice has not been issued the request is allowed. Petition is dismissed as not pressed with pending application(s), whereas, the Petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh Petition which shall be dealt with in accordance with law. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
